name: Lisbon
tagline: Europe's Sunniest Capital for Early Retirement
description: Lisbon has become the undisputed FIRE capital of Europe, offering the D7 passive income visa, the NHR tax regime with potential zero-tax on foreign income, and a thriving expat community. With 300 days of sunshine, world-class seafood, and living costs a fraction of Western Europe, it delivers first-world infrastructure at developing-world prices.

quickFacts.visa: D7 Passive Income Visa (renewable, path to citizenship in 5 years). NHR tax regime offers 10-year tax benefits on foreign income.
quickFacts.safetyRating: Very Safe — 6th safest country globally (Global Peace Index)
quickFacts.nearestAirport: Lisbon Humberto Delgado Airport (LIS) — 15 min from city center
quickFacts.climate: Mediterranean with mild winters (10-15°C) and warm summers (25-30°C). Over 300 days of sunshine per year.

housing.description: Modern 1-bedroom apartment in Arroios or Benfica, away from tourist center but well-connected by metro

dining.description: Local tascas and cafes for most meals, occasional splurge at a mid-range restaurant. Daily pastel de nata and espresso ritual.

healthcare.description: Public SNS healthcare plus basic private insurance supplement for faster specialist access

transportation.description: Monthly Navegante pass covering metro, bus, tram, and train across greater Lisbon

entertainment.description: Free miradouro sunsets, neighborhood fado nights, museum visits on free Sundays, beach trips to Cascais

1M.lifestyle: A clean 1-bedroom in a residential neighborhood like Arroios, well-connected by metro to the center. Cooking most meals at home with affordable produce from local markets, eating out at tascas a couple of times a week. Getting around on the Navegante transit pass. Public healthcare with a basic private supplement. Comfortable and livable, though dining out and travel require planning around the budget.

housing.description: Spacious 2-bedroom apartment in Principe Real or Santos with river views and updated kitchen

dining.description: Regular dining at Lisbon's celebrated restaurants, weekend brunches in Chiado, wine tastings in Bairro Alto

healthcare.description: Comprehensive private health insurance with top-tier hospitals like CUF Descobertas, dental included

transportation.description: Navegante pass plus occasional Bolt rides and weekend car rentals for Sintra and Alentejo trips

entertainment.description: Surf lessons in Ericeira, cultural memberships, live music at Musicbox, regular Benfica or Sporting matches

2M.lifestyle: A spacious 2-bedroom in a desirable area like Principe Real or Santos. Dining out several times a week at good restaurants, with weekend trips to Sintra or the coast by rental car. Comprehensive private health insurance at a hospital like CUF Descobertas. Day-to-day life is easy and you don't need to think much about everyday costs, though Lisbon's rising prices mean this isn't limitless.

housing.description: Premium 3-bedroom apartment in Chiado or a renovated townhouse in Estrela with terrace and parking

dining.description: Fine dining at Michelin-starred venues like Belcanto, private wine dinners, chef's table experiences across the city

healthcare.description: Premium private insurance with international coverage, concierge medicine, annual executive health checks

transportation.description: Leased mid-range car plus Navegante pass, regular Bolt Premium rides

entertainment.description: Golf at Oitavos Dunes, sailing on the Tagus, VIP concert tickets, weekend getaways to the Azores or Madeira

3M.lifestyle: A large apartment in Chiado or a renovated townhouse in Estrela with a terrace. Dining at good restaurants regularly, including occasional Michelin-starred meals at places like Belcanto. A leased car for weekend drives and regional flights to the Azores or Madeira a few times a year. Premium private healthcare with international coverage. Genuinely affluent living in a city where this budget goes far.

housing.description: Luxury penthouse in Avenida da Liberdade or historic palacete in Lapa with panoramic Tagus river views

dining.description: Personal chef for weekly dinner parties, Michelin tasting menus as routine, curated Portuguese wine collection

healthcare.description: International premium insurance, dedicated private physician, wellness retreats, specialized treatments

transportation.description: Leased luxury vehicle (BMW/Mercedes), private transfers, occasional helicopter to Algarve

entertainment.description: Private yacht charters, exclusive golf memberships, box seats at cultural events, art collecting

domesticHelp.description: Full-time housekeeper, weekly deep cleaning, laundry and ironing service

luxuryExtras.description: Personal trainer, private Portuguese tutor, annual wardrobe refresh, premium co-working membership at Second Home

5M.lifestyle: A large penthouse on Avenida da Liberdade or a historic apartment in Lapa with panoramic river views. Regular dining at the city's best restaurants, business class for longer flights, and a cleaner several times a week. A leased BMW or Mercedes for weekend drives to the Algarve. Premium private healthcare and a personal trainer. High-quality daily life with real comfort, and Lisbon's costs mean this budget stretches further than in most Western European capitals.

housing.description: Restored historic mansion in Lapa or ultra-luxury duplex penthouse on Avenida da Liberdade with concierge services

dining.description: Full-time private chef, curated wine cellar, exclusive supper club memberships, flying in ingredients from across Europe

healthcare.description: Global concierge medicine, dedicated wellness team, fly-anywhere-for-treatment coverage, anti-aging protocols

transportation.description: Chauffeured luxury vehicle, private jet charter for European hops, vintage car collection

entertainment.description: Philanthropic engagements, art patronage, private island retreats in Azores, front-row at Lisbon Fashion Week

domesticHelp.description: Full household staff: housekeeper, cook, gardener, personal assistant, and estate manager

luxuryExtras.description: Interior designer on retainer, bespoke tailoring, private art curation, charitable foundation management, vintage port collection

10M.lifestyle: A restored historic mansion in Lapa or an ultra-luxury penthouse on Avenida da Liberdade with concierge services. Regular fine dining, a cook a few times a week, and full private healthcare with no wait times. A housekeeper, business class travel as default, and first class for longer trips. A nice car and driver when needed. You never think about money day-to-day, though at this level in Lisbon you're near the ceiling of what the city offers in terms of premium services.
